content.text: Let me inspect the specific resources before patching.

input.command:
echo "=== RoleBinding ==="; kubectl get rolebinding spark-role-binding -n spark-team-a -o jsonpath='{.subjects}'; echo
echo "=== HS volumes ==="; kubectl get deployment spark-history-server -n spark-history -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.volumes}'; echo
echo "=== HS env ==="; kubectl get deployment spark-history-server -n spark-history -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].env}'; echo
echo "=== HS pod pending reason ==="; kubectl describe pod -n spark-history -l app=spark-history-server | grep -A5 Events

content.text: All three bugs confirmed. Let me apply the fixes.

input.command:
echo "=== Fix 1: RoleBinding namespace ==="
kubectl patch rolebinding spark-role-binding -n spark-team-a --type=json \
  -p='[{"op": "replace", "path": "/subjects/0/namespace", "value": "spark-team-a"}]'

echo "=== Fix 2: PVC claimName ==="
kubectl patch deployment spark-history-server -n spark-history --type=json \
  -p='[{"op": "replace", "path": "/spec/template/spec/volumes/0/persistentVolumeClaim/claimName", "value": "spark-history-pvc"}]'

echo "=== Fix 3: log directory ==="
kubectl set env deployment/spark-history-server -n spark-history \
  SPARK_HISTORY_OPTS="-Dspark.history.fs.logDirectory=/mnt/spark-logs -Dspark.history.fs.update.interval=5s -Dspark.history.ui.port=18080"

content.content:
=== Fix 1: RoleBinding namespace ===
rolebinding.rbac.authorization.k8s.io/spark-role-binding patched
=== Fix 2: PVC claimName ===
deployment.apps/spark-history-server patched
=== Fix 3: log directory ===
deployment.apps/spark-history-server env updated

content.text: The PVC is now provisioning (it was waiting for first consumer, which the patched pod now provides). Let me poll for everything to settle.

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  hs=$(kubectl get pods -n spark-history -l app=spark-history-server -o jsonpath='{.items[0].status.phase}' 2>/dev/null)
  ja=$(kubectl get job spark-pi-team-a -n spark-team-a -o jsonpath='{.status.succeeded}' 2>/dev/null)
  jb=$(kubectl get job spark-pi-team-b -n spark-team-b -o jsonpath='{.status.succeeded}' 2>/dev/null)
  echo "[$i] HS=$hs jobA_succeeded=${ja:-0} jobB_succeeded=${jb:-0}"
  if [ "$hs" = "Running" ] && [ "${ja:-0}" = "1" ] && [ "${jb:-0}" = "1" ]; then echo DONE; break; fi
  sleep 15
done
